content: Hi, I'm looking for my first home. Budget is around $400-500k. Preferably a condo or townhouse in the downtown area.
Welcome David! Great to help you with your first home purchase. Do you have any specific requirements? Number of bedrooms, parking, etc?
At least 2 bedrooms. I have a golden retriever so the building needs to be pet-friendly. Parking would be nice but not a dealbreaker.
David, I found a nice 2-bed condo at 200 Park Ave, Unit 5B. $465k, pet-friendly building, has a dog park nearby. Want to schedule a viewing?
That sounds good! But I'm a bit nervous about the mortgage rates right now. Do you think it's a good time to buy? I don't want to overextend myself.
Saw the 200 Park Ave unit today. I really liked the layout and the natural light. But $465k feels a bit high for my comfort level. Is there room to negotiate?
It's been on market for 45 days so there might be some flexibility. I can try to get them down to $445-450k. Also, the HOA is $380/month which includes utilities.
Also checked out 88 River Walk, Unit 12A. $420k, 2 bed. Nice but the building doesn't allow dogs over 25 lbs. My retriever is 70 lbs so that's a no-go.
Hey, any new listings? I've been pre-approved for $480k now. Still want pet-friendly, at least 2 bed. Starting to feel more ready to pull the trigger.
Great news on the pre-approval! I have a new one: 150 Harbor Blvd, Unit 8C, $458k, 2 bed 2 bath, pet-friendly with no weight limit. In-unit laundry too. Available this weekend?
